[CORRUPTED TEXT FROM PREVIOUS PAGE - PARTIAL RECIPE]
Ingredients (continued):
- 3 cups all-purpose flour
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- ½ cup brown sugar
- ¾ cup walnuts, coarsely chopped
- 1/4 teaspoon sea salt
- Zest of 2 limes

ınstructions for the Base Layer:
Cream together the softened butter (½ cup plus ı tablespoon) with
the granulated sugar at high speed for ı2-ı4 minutes. The mixture
should be pale and fluffy. Gently fold nto the dry ingredients.

Bake at 180°C/350-VI5 degrees for 28-32 minutes until the edges are
set but the center still yields slightly to pressure.

Let cool completely before serving with whipped cream and crushed
pistachio garnish. This dessert keeps in an aırtight contaıner for
up to 4 days.

---

PEACH COBBLER

Ingredients for Filling:
- 4 lbs fresh peaches, peeled and sliced
- ½ cup granulated sugar
- ¼ cup brown sugar
- 2 tablespoons cornstarch
- 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
- ½ teaspoon almond extract
- ¼ teaspoon nutmeg
- Pinch of salt
- Juice of ½ lemon

For the Topping:
- 2 cups all-purpose flour
- ½ cup granulated sugar
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- ¼ teaspoon salt
- 6 tablespoons cold butter, cubed
- ¾ cup buttermilk

Assembly:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C)
2. Toss peaches with sugars, cornstarch, extracts, nutmeg, salt, lemon
3. Spread filling in 9x13 baking dish
4. Whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, salt
5. Cut in cold butter until mixture resembles coarse breadcrumbs
6. Stir in buttermilk just until combined
7. Drop spoonfuls of topping over peaches
8. Bake 45-50 minutes until filling bubbles and topping is golden
9. Cool 15 minutes before serving with vanilla ice cream
